description: Resolve the remaining fz2 source-surface failures from the fz-rh2.9 sweep after the upstream macro/runtime split and source-spine cleanup are in place: keyword_lists, no_parens_call, no_parens_do, no_parens_keyword, sample_tests, sample_tests_module. The item-macro portion is no longer a place to patch around macro executable churn; that must be fixed upstream by fz-rh2.16.9. What remains here are the front-door/source-surface contract gaps that sit above the artifact seam: unsupported compiler2 prefixes for keyword/no-parens forms, item-level test macro handling once macro expansion has a stable fixed point, and test module main/root policy. Signal: each surface is either supported through normal source expansion and fixture-matrix fz2 paths, or explicitly declared outside the compiler2 cutover contract.
title: Fix fz2 source-surface parser and item macro gaps
